hooks.command: jq -r '.tool_input.file_path // empty' | { read -r p; case "$p" in *.py) if command -v ruff >/dev/null 2>&1; then ruff format "$p" >/dev/null 2>&1; elif [ -x .venv/bin/ruff ]; then .venv/bin/ruff format "$p" >/dev/null 2>&1; fi ;; esac; exit 0; }

jq -r '.tool_input.file_path // empty' | { read -r p; case "$p" in *.py) py=$(command -v python3 || command -v python); [ -x .venv/bin/python ] && py=.venv/bin/python; out=$("$py" -m py_compile "$p" 2>&1) || { printf 'py_compile failed for %s:\n%s\n' "$p" "$out" >&2; exit 2; } ;; esac; exit 0; }
